title: helianthemum croceum var. albiflorum
intro: Helianthemum croceum var. albiflorum, also known as Rockrose or White Rockrose, is a flowering plant that belongs to the Cistaceae family and is native to the Mediterranean region. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Helianthemum croceum var. albiflorum include its ability to soothe skin irritations, reduce fever, and support the immune system. The herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health issues, although it's essential to consult with a medical professional before using any herbal remedies.
